home.title: Promilia Battle Axis Editor
home.subtitle: A professional battle axis tool for Promilia: Ballad of the Blue Star

guide.title: Guide
guide.interfaceOverviewDesc: The axis editor interface is mainly divided into the following parts:
guide.skillLibraryDesc: Contains all character skills that can be dragged to the timeline
guide.timelineDesc: The main editing area that displays skill release times and order
guide.controlPanelDesc: Contains operation buttons such as play, pause, save, etc.
guide.addSkillDesc: To add a skill to the timeline, follow these steps:
guide.addSkillStep1: Select a skill in the skill library
guide.addSkillStep2: Drag the skill to the target position on the timeline
guide.addSkillStep3: Adjust the skill's start time and duration
guide.adjustSkillDesc: After adding a skill, you can:
guide.dragSkill: Drag the skill block to adjust its start time
guide.resizeSkill: Drag the edges of the skill block to adjust its duration
guide.editSkill: Double-click the skill block to edit its detailed properties
guide.playbackDesc: Click the play button to preview the execution process of the entire axis, helping you check if the skill release timing is correct.
guide.skillLinkingDesc: Through the skill linking feature, you can set trigger relationships between skills to achieve more complex skill combinations.
guide.optimizationDesc: When optimizing the axis, you need to pay attention to the following points:
guide.optimizationTip1: Reasonably arrange the release order of skills to ensure smooth connection between skills
guide.optimizationTip2: Pay attention to skill cooldowns to avoid skill conflicts
guide.optimizationTip3: Choose appropriate skill combinations based on enemy weaknesses and mechanisms
guide.advancedFeaturesDesc: The axis editor also provides some advanced features, such as damage calculation, enemy AI simulation, etc., to help you more accurately optimize the axis.
guide.faqA1: You can click the save button in the control panel to save the axis as a preset or export it as a file.
guide.faqQ2: How to import axes shared by others?
guide.faqA2: Click the import button and select the axis file to load the axis shared by others.
guide.faqQ3: Where to set the cooldown time of skills?
guide.faqA3: The cooldown time of skills is set in the data editor. You can modify the cooldown time by editing the character's skill properties.
guide.faqQ4: How to adjust the zoom ratio of the timeline?
guide.faqA4: You can use the mouse wheel to zoom on the timeline, or adjust the timeline display ratio in the settings.
guide.faqQ5: Is the damage calculation of axis simulation accurate?
guide.faqA5: The damage calculation is based on in-game data, but there may be some random factors affecting it in actual games, so it is for reference only.
guide.tip1: Using keyboard shortcuts can greatly improve editing efficiency
guide.tip2: Using the grid snap feature can more accurately align skill times
guide.tip3: Using copy and paste functions can quickly reuse similar skill combinations
guide.tip4: Save the axis regularly to avoid accidental loss of work results
guide.practice1: First plan the overall strategy, then refine each skill's time point
guide.practice2: Try different skill combinations to find the optimal solution
guide.practice3: Refer to community-shared preset axes to learn from others' experience
